title: Tactical Withdrawal
summary: Ordered retreat when battle conditions become unfavorable.
details: Withdrawal is not defeat - it preserves force for future battles. Conditions for withdrawal: critical damage, heavily outnumbered, objective lost, low ammunition. Execute by: ordering evasive course away from enemy, calling for covering fire from allies, using smoke/chaff to break locks. Never turn engines toward enemy during withdrawal - you cannot shoot or detect what's behind you. Accelerate to maximum safe velocity.
annotations: A ship that escapes fights again.
Withdrawal requires discipline - don't panic but don't delay.
